title: In The Press | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab’s public relations hits. Our expertise and professional services are recognized and featured in top digital and print media and publications.
body_markdown:
# 
StretchLab Making Headlines 
![Flexologist assisting person with stretch](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/400-tall.jpg)
##    
Press Releases  

[ ![Running](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/FINAL_S3A5832-2.jpg) ](https://www.runnersworld.com/health-injuries/a71110488/stretching-tools/?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
April 28, 2026 | Runner's World
[ Stretching and Mobility Exercise Feels Good. Here’s How to Do More of It Even Better. ](https://www.runnersworld.com/health-injuries/a71110488/stretching-tools/?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
StretchLab is featured in Runner’s World, where Kelsey Kerr, Director of Training & Experience, shares expert insights on how stretching and mobility tools support recovery, flexibility, and better movement for runners.
[ Read More ](https://www.runnersworld.com/health-injuries/a71110488/stretching-tools/?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)

[ StretchLab Spartanburg highlights heart-healthy movement in February ](https://www.wspa.com/news/stretchlab-spartanburg-highlights-heart-healthy-movement-in-february/?utm_medium=social&utm_source=facebook_WSPA_7News&fbclid=IwY2xjawQMHhFleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETJjOFZvd1prVnppSW9tdGhPc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHgfChyri-8wT9Jmul6lKy4Pbpv57rUlQUX4Jr-uv9cCag-ot4SDqJgBZW1fX_aem_faAtUz8zfkIDA9saQBhCOA&amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
StretchLab in Spartanburg highlights how movement and assisted stretching can support heart health and overall mobility. Stretching is a great option for people who are new to movement, experiencing stiffness, or feeling uncomfortable in their bodies, helping create greater ease of movement and confidence over time.

July 14, 2025 | Lynwood Times
